<!-- # Security Allocation -->

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Security Distribution

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
viewof equityTickersBarChart = {
  // Only proceed if we have equity tickers data
  if (!equity_tickers || equity_tickers.length === 0) 
    return html`<div>No ticker data available</div>`;
  
  // First, calculate total weights by asset type (same as in table)
  let equityTotal = 0;
  let bondTotal = 0;
  
  equity_tickers.forEach(t => {
    if (t.Type === "Equity") {
      equityTotal += t.Risky_Pf_Weight;
    } else if (t.Type === "Bond") {
      bondTotal += t.Risky_Pf_Weight;
    }
  });
  
  // Prepare data for the bar chart - top 10 holdings by weight
  const barData = equity_tickers
    .sort((a, b) => b.Risky_Pf_Weight - a.Risky_Pf_Weight)
    .slice(0, 10)
    .map(t => {
      // Calculate normalized weight within asset class
      const assetClassWeight = 
        t.Type === "Equity" ? 
          (equityTotal > 0 ? t.Risky_Pf_Weight / equityTotal : 0) : 
          (bondTotal > 0 ? t.Risky_Pf_Weight / bondTotal : 0);
      
      // Calculate weight in risky portfolio
      const riskyPfWeight = 
        t.Type === "Equity" ?
          assetClassWeight * equity_weight :
          assetClassWeight * bond_weight;
          
      // Calculate weight in complete portfolio (matches table)
      const completePfWeight = riskyPfWeight * fixed_optimal_weight;
      
      return {
        ticker: t.Ticker,
        weight: completePfWeight * 100 // Convert to percentage
      };
    });

  // Create the bar chart
  return Plot.plot({
    marginLeft: 80,
    x: {
      label: "",
      domain: barData.map(d => d.ticker),
      padding: 0.3
    },
    y: {
      label: "Portfolio Weight (%)",
      domain: [0, Math.max(...barData.map(d => d.weight)) * 1.1], // Add some padding at the top
      grid: true,
      tickFormat: d => d.toFixed(1) + "%"
    },
    marks: [
      Plot.barY(barData, {
        x: "ticker", 
        y: "weight",
        fill: "ticker", 
        tip: true,
        title: d => `${d.ticker}: ${d.weight.toFixed(2)}%`
      }),
      Plot.text(barData, {
        x: "ticker",
        y: "weight",
        text: d => `${d.weight.toFixed(1)}%`,
        dy: -10,
        fontWeight: "bold",
        fontSize: 16 
      })
    ],
    color: {
      legend: false
    }
  });
};
```

### Allocation Table

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false
// Process and display equity ticker weights

equity_ticker_weights = () => {
  if (!equity_tickers || equity_tickers.length === 0) 
    return html`<div>No ticker data available</div>`;
  
  // First, calculate total weights by asset type
  let equityTotal = 0;
  let bondTotal = 0;
  
  equity_tickers.forEach(t => {
    if (t.Type === "Equity") {
      equityTotal += t.Risky_Pf_Weight;
    } else if (t.Type === "Bond") {
      bondTotal += t.Risky_Pf_Weight;
    }
  });
  
  return html`
    <div style="margin-top: 5px;">
      <div style="max-height: 300px; overflow-y: auto;">
        <table class="table table-sm" style="font-size: 0.85rem;">
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th>Asset Class</th>
              <th>Ticker</th>
              <th>Name</th>
              <th>Sector</th>
              <th>Asset Class Weight</th>
              <th>Risky Pf Weight</th>
              <th>Complete Pf Weight</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            ${equity_tickers
              .sort((a, b) => b.Risky_Pf_Weight - a.Risky_Pf_Weight)
              .slice(0, 10)
              .map(t => {
                // Calculate normalized weight within asset class
                const assetClassWeight = 
                  t.Type === "Equity" ? 
                    (equityTotal > 0 ? t.Risky_Pf_Weight / equityTotal : 0) : 
                    (bondTotal > 0 ? t.Risky_Pf_Weight / bondTotal : 0);
                
                // Calculate weight in risky portfolio
                const riskyPfWeight = 
                  t.Type === "Equity" ?
                    assetClassWeight * equity_weight :
                    assetClassWeight * bond_weight;
                    
                // Calculate weight in complete portfolio
                const completePfWeight = riskyPfWeight * fixed_optimal_weight;
                    
                return html`
                  <tr>
                    <td>${t.Type}</td>
                    <td>${t.Ticker}</td>
                    <td>${t.Name}</td>
                    <td>${t.Sector}</td>
                    <td>${formatPercent(assetClassWeight)}</td>
                    <td>${formatPercent(riskyPfWeight)}</td>
                    <td>${formatPercent(completePfWeight)}</td>
                  </tr>
                `
              })}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
}
```

```{ojs}
// Display the ticker weights
equity_ticker_weights();
```

<!-- 
## Equity Securities

::: {.panel-tabset style="height: calc(100vh - 450px); overflow-y: auto;"} -->

## Equity Efficient Frontier

```{ojs}
html`
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%;">
    <div style="position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 96%;">
      <iframe 
        width="100%" 
        height="100%" 
        src="https://raw.githack.com/renan-peres/mfin-portfolio-management/refs/heads/main/reports/efficient_frontier_2025-04-26.html"
        frameborder="0"
        allowfullscreen
      ></iframe>
    </div>
  </div>
`;
```

### Optimal Equity Weight

```{python}
# Order Columns
ef_desired_order = ['Ticker', 'Weight', 'Expected Return', 'Standard Deviation', 'Sharpe Ratio']
optimal_portfolio_ef = equity_disp.copy()  # Don't drop those columns
all_columns = optimal_portfolio_ef.columns.tolist()
first_columns = [col for col in ef_desired_order if col in all_columns]
optimal_portfolio_ef = optimal_portfolio_ef[first_columns].sort_values(by="Weight", ascending=False).transpose()

# Display the result
display(optimal_portfolio_ef)
```

## Bond Securities

## Covariances
